description: Conformance-vector manifest. Status 'pending' means the vector file does not yet exist; the populating task is named in 'task'. When a task lands, swap .pending → the real .json file and flip status to 'frozen'.

vectors.name: ed25519_sign_verify
vectors.summary: Known pubkey + message + signature — verify round-trip via node:crypto plus tamper-fails. 1 case.

vectors.name: did_key_from_ed25519_pub
vectors.summary: did:key URI derivation from raw Ed25519 public key. 2 cases (cross-ref with 10.5 pubkey + all-zero edge). Re-derivable via @scure/base base58btc + 0xed 0x01 multicodec varint.

vectors.name: canonical_request_string
vectors.summary: buildCanonicalPayload happy path + empty-query + empty-body-hash edge cases. 5 cases.

vectors.name: sha256_body_hash
vectors.summary: SHA-256 body-hash hex output for empty body + representative request bodies. 5 cases, all re-derivable via node:crypto.

vectors.name: blake2b_24_sealed_nonce
vectors.summary: BLAKE2b with 24-byte output over (ephemeral_pub || recipient_pub). 3 cases. Re-derivable via @noble/hashes blake2b{dkLen:24}. Pins the libsodium-compat formula and catches the pre-#9 SHA-512 regression.

vectors.name: nacl_sealed_box
vectors.summary: libsodium crypto_box_seal decrypt vectors — 3 cases (hello_dina, empty, json_body). External implementations verify by decrypting with the shipped recipient keypair and matching plaintext. Ciphertext overhead is 48 bytes (32-byte ephemeral pub + 16-byte Poly1305 MAC).

vectors.name: auth_challenge_response
vectors.summary: Full MsgBox WebSocket auth handshake — challenge frame → signed response (with pub + sig hex) → success frame. L3 round-trip + tamper-fail.

vectors.name: d2d_envelope_round_trip
vectors.summary: buildMessageJSON output bytes for a representative DinaMessage — key order + to-array normalisation. 4 cases.

vectors.name: plc_document_verification
vectors.summary: Dina-flavoured PLC document with Multikey + #dina_signing + #dina_messaging fragments. Shape-level assertions only; crypto verification lands with task 10.11.

vectors.name: trust_score_v1
vectors.summary: Trust Network V1 score formula — 14 cases pinning every component (sentiment / vouch / reviewer / network), every flag severity, the tombstone coordination penalty, and confidence tiers. Re-derivable via packages/protocol/src/trust/score_v1.ts :: computeScoreV1(input, nowMs) with nowMs fixed to 2026-04-22T12:00:00Z. AppView's scorer mirrors the same formula with `now = Date.now()`.
